title: Binary Search (Standard)
pattern: Binary Search â€” Standard on Sorted Array
coreIdea: Find a target's index in a sorted array in O(log n) by repeatedly halving the search range, comparing the middle element to the target and discarding the half that cannot contain it.
recognitionCues: asks for target index or existence check
approach: Set low=0, high=n-1. While low <= high, compute mid. If arr[mid] == target, return mid. If arr[mid] < target, search right half (low = mid+1). Else search left half (high = mid-1). Return -1 if not found.
